name: 0-dex
description: Agent-native trading on the serverless 0-dex P2P network using 0-lang graphs.

tools.name: zero_dex_limit_order
tools.description: Broadcasts a limit order intent to the 0-dex P2P network.

buy_asset.description: The token symbol you want to buy (e.g. 'ETH').

sell_asset.description: The token symbol you are selling (e.g. 'USDC').

min_price.description: The minimum acceptable price in sell_asset per buy_asset.

amount.description: The total amount of buy_asset you want to acquire.
